title: A Newsom/Harris Ticket?
summary: Jessica Tarlov and Aaron Parnas discuss whether or not Kamala Harris is gearing up for a 2028 presidential run, on Raging Moderates.
transcript_html:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/AnKwoQeGscA

Transcript

Kla Harris was on the partner's perspective. What did she say about potentially running in 2028? >> Well, as any good politician, uh, she did not announce her candidacy for 2028 on my show. I know it sucks. >> I do think she's going to run though based on >> Really? >> Yeah, I think she'll run. And personally, I think she'll announce by the end of the year. I think she's going to try to do like a Trump 2.0 of like announce right after the midterms. I think that she is to some degree just buying herself time and buying herself time as the front runner when she might not be running. Like I feel like she's not going to run.

>> Listen, if she doesn't run, it's it kind of seems like Newsome's inevitability at this point unless something radically changes. If she does run, then I think it's a two-headed kind of race. >> California monster >> Newsome Harris 2028. >> Who stabs who first? >> Oh, I I would not support that ticket. And no, >> I'm kidding.
